arts.ttl: Chelsea make Cole Palmer registration decision for Conference League
arts.sum: Chelsea have now been given the opportunity to add new players to their Conference League squad – Axel Disasi, Renato Veiga, Carney Chukwuemeka, Cesare Casadei and Joao Felix are all out after leaving the club – and Palmer is included alongside Chalobah, who was recalled from a loan spell at Crystal Palace in January, and new arrival Amougou. "We played some games without Cole, but Cole is something extra that you need," Maresca said of Palmer's omission at the time.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to keep monitoring PL teenager with 'big potential' after failing to sign him in January - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly not giving up hope of signing a Premier League youngster despite failing in their attempt to get him in the January transfer...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca Chelsea impact undermined for two reasons, claims former attacker
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's impact at Chelsea during the first six months of his reign has been undermined for two reasons, former winger Shaun Wright-Phillips tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: 'Returned': Chelsea youngster compared to Cole Palmer is back in training - journalist
arts.sum: It looks as if the injury bug is catching up with Chelsea ahead of the final few months of the first season under Enzo Maresca...

arts.ttl: Chelsea Conference League squad: Three players in, two miss out as Enzo Maresca finalises selection for last 16
arts.sum: Chelsea confirm their Conference League squad for the last 16 and potentially beyond, adding three players to their group.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool and Chelsea scouted 'one of the best talents in Europe’ last week ahead of possible summer move

arts.ttl: Mathis Amougou names his favourite Chelsea player of all time and his best position in club Q&A
arts.sum: Most Chelsea supporters won’t know a lot about new signing Mathis Amougou, but he’s just done a Q&A with the club that will help them...

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu grew up in a sports-mad house as a Chelsea fan who idolised Eden Hazard... now he gets his shot in England with Man United - and Ruben Amorim desperately needs the wing-back to hit the ground running
arts.sum: For Patrick Dorgu, as it is for so many players, getting a crack at the Premier League has long been the dream. Only in Dorgu's case in that dream it was in blue, rather than red, that he'd turn out.

arts.ttl: Brighton's latest transfer twist with Sunderland sends a clear message to Simon Adingra and agent
arts.sum: An unsettling January transfer window for Brighton’s Ivory Coast international and AFCON winner
